description:
The TailwindTraders project has undergone a reorganization, splitting into three teams: Frontend, Backend, and Infrastructure. Currently, all work items are unstructured in the root area. Create three new child Area Paths under 'TailwindTraders': 'TailwindTraders\Backend', 'TailwindTraders\Frontend', and 'TailwindTraders\Infrastructure'. Reassign the existing 8 work items to these new areas according to the mapping below, ensuring no work items remain in the root 'TailwindTraders' area path.

| Work Item Title | Target Area |
|---|---|
| Implement product search API endpoint | Backend |
| Design REST API rate limiter middleware | Backend |
| Fix product price rounding error | Backend |
| Redesign shopping cart UI | Frontend |
| Fix CSS grid layout on product listing page | Frontend |
| Optimize dashboard lazy loading | Frontend |
| Configure CI/CD pipeline alerts | Infrastructure |
| Set up automated database backup schedule | Infrastructure |
